title: lophopetalum micranthum
intro: Lophopetalum micranthum is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lophopetalum micranthum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lophopetalum micranthum include decoctions, infusions, and powder, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
